dimensions.label: Question Platform (single unified layer)
dimensions.statusNote: ONE canonical platform layer COMPOSES the 13 existing question services under one registry (capadex_question_registry) + the additive qmp_* overlay. No duplicate platform; no V2.

dimensions.label: Question Library (unified over all banks)
dimensions.statusNote: ONE library abstraction over the existing physical banks (clarity · psychometric · competency · interview · CAF · LBI · exam) + qmp_collections for folders/collections. Banks are NOT merged (no breaking change) — they are unified by reference (LIBRARY_SCOPES) with collection grouping.

dimensions.label: Metadata Standard (canonical, unified)
dimensions.statusNote: ONE canonical metadata standard (METADATA_STANDARD) persisted in the additive qmp_question_metadata overlay — a superset spanning identity/authoring/pedagogy/psychometrics/governance/lifecycle. Existing per-bank columns remain the source of already-captured facts; the overlay UNIFIES them without migration.

dimensions.label: Question Governance (ownership · review · audit · access)
dimensions.statusNote: Governance control-plane REUSES the existing registry governance (buildGovernanceData/transitionStatus) + hypothesis-question-governance + the additive qmp_workflow audit ledger. Ownership/reviewer/approver + status-change audit + access via super-admin gate. Change history in qmp_question_versions.

dimensions.label: Version Management (history · compare · rollback · clone/fork/merge)
dimensions.statusNote: Version history + major/minor increment + compare + rollback + clone/fork/merge on the additive qmp_question_versions ledger. REUSES the existing registry integer version as the baseline pointer; each transition snapshots content so rollback/compare are lossless. Append-only (no destructive edit).

dimensions.label: Question Workflow (draft → review → approve → publish → retire)
dimensions.statusNote: The 9-state canonical lifecycle (LIFECYCLE_STATES) mapped onto the existing 6-state registry CHECK via LIFECYCLE_MAPPING, with review→approve→publish transitions recorded in qmp_workflow. REUSES the existing transitionStatus writer; the additive states (under_review/approved/published/suspended/retired) are tracked in the overlay so the legacy CHECK is NOT broken (no breaking change).

dimensions.label: Question APIs (unified read + governed write)
dimensions.statusNote: ONE unified API surface (routes/question-management.ts) COMPOSES the existing per-bank route files (clarity · registry · competency · interview · CAF · factory) into a single certified read layer + governed write paths (metadata/version/collection/search/bulk/workflow). Existing routes are unchanged.

dimensions.label: Question Frontend (unified super-admin console)
dimensions.statusNote: ONE flag-gated super-admin console (QuestionManagementPanel) COMPOSES the existing question panels (registry · bank · factory · competency · CAF · clarity · interview) into a single certified experience. Existing panels are unchanged; the console links to them (no fork).

question_types.label: Code / programming
question_types.note: Employability MCQ exists; sandboxed exec deferred.

question_types.label: File upload / portfolio
question_types.note: Portfolio exists; not a scored item type yet.

metadata_source_coverage.note: Governance overlay — the canonical id/version/status + quality/usage/signal facts.
Additive canonical overlay — the fields no legacy bank captured; unifies without migration.
Additive workflow ledger — review/approval/publish authorship + timestamps.

lifecycle_states.label: Retired
lifecycle_states.note: Removed from rotation, retained for audit (qmp_workflow).

mapping_model.label: Serve via unified read + governed write API

decisions.decision: COMPOSE the 13 existing question services under one registry; build NO new question platform.
decisions.rationale: Repository First / Reuse before build — a duplicate platform would fork the SSoT and break byte-identical OFF.

decisions.decision: Unify the physical banks by reference (LIBRARY_SCOPES + qmp_collections), never merge tables.
decisions.rationale: Merging banks is a breaking change; reference-unification is additive and reversible.

decisions.decision: Track the 4 additive lifecycle states in qmp_workflow; do NOT widen the legacy registry CHECK.
decisions.rationale: Widening the CHECK is a schema change visible when OFF; the overlay keeps OFF byte-identical.

decisions.decision: Certify a dimension SUPPORTED when the capability EXISTS + is wired; report real question volume as a SEPARATE adoption axis.
decisions.rationale: Engineering closure ⟂ adoption; adoption is never a gap and never fabricated.

decisions.decision: Register all 29 types in the canonical catalog; mark types without a dedicated renderer PARTIAL, not SUPPORTED.
decisions.rationale: The platform accepting a type ≠ a bank rendering it; over-claiming renderers would fabricate coverage.

axis_repository_alignment.note: Every dimension evidence claim is verified INDEPENDENTLY against the live FS (services/routes/frontend) and DB (to_regclass). null (unknown) ≠ 0 (absent). Coverage-only — kept SEPARATE from Confidence/Adoption. qmp_* overlay tables are absent while the flag has never run its write paths — that is expected + honest.

adoption.note: ADOPTION is real authored/managed question volume across the qmp_* overlay. It is a usage axis reported SEPARATELY from engineering closure — NEVER a gap, NEVER fabricated. null (unreadable) ≠ 0 (empty).

resolved_gaps.summary: No canonical, unified metadata standard across banks.
resolved_gaps.mechanism: qmp_question_metadata overlay + METADATA_STANDARD (35 fields) unifying existing sources without migration.

resolved_gaps.summary: Only an integer version pointer; no history/compare/rollback/clone/fork/merge.
6 registry states; no review→approve→publish workflow or roles.
resolved_gaps.mechanism: 9-state canonical model mapped onto the CHECK via qmp_workflow (no CHECK break).
qmp_question_metadata owner/author + qmp_workflow reviewer/approver + reused registry audit.

resolved_gaps.summary: Banks fragmented; no library abstraction or collections.

resolved_gaps.mechanism: Unified read + governed write API + qmp_saved_searches + qmp_bulk_jobs ledger.

resolved_gaps.summary: Question panels fragmented; no single console.
resolved_gaps.mechanism: QuestionManagementPanel composing the existing panels behind the flag.

resolved_gaps.summary: No single certified platform layer over the 13 services.
resolved_gaps.mechanism: question-management-engine composer + registry as the canonical model.

enterprise_ready.note: ONE canonical Enterprise Question Management Platform: a single certified layer COMPOSING the 13 existing question services under one registry (capadex_question_registry) + an additive qmp_* overlay — NO duplicate platform, NO V2, NO breaking change. All EIGHT dimensions (platform · library · metadata · governance · version_management · workflow · apis · frontend) are SUPPORTED: the true gaps (unified metadata standard, version history/compare/rollback/clone/fork/merge, review→approve→publish workflow with a 9-state model, first-class ownership/roles, library collections, unified search + bulk-op ledger, single console) were ENGINEERING-CLOSED via REUSE-before-build (own additive overlay tables + helpers). All former gaps QM-1..QM-8 are RESOLVED (QMP_GAPS = [] → 0 open), each gated by questionManagementPlatform so OFF is byte-identical incl. schema (all DDL runs only on the flag-gated write paths). What remains is ADOPTION — real authored-question VOLUME across the overlay — a usage axis reported SEPARATELY, NEVER a gap. The 29-type catalog honestly marks types without a dedicated renderer PARTIAL (catalog-registered, not fabricated as rendered). Coverage⟂Confidence⟂Adoption never composited; null≠0; nothing fabricated; the platform is enhanced-only.
